case_title: FRANCES VARNEY ET AL VS. AIRBNB, INC.

docket_entries.description: REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED AT THE WINDOW VIA MESSENGER.
CHANGE OF ADDRESS FOR PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF VARNEY, FRANCES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $85. SERVED APR-05-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.

ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER FRANCES VARNEY REQUEST

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFFS FRANCES VARNEY AND TREVOT VARNEY ARE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL. DEFENDANT STATED THIS MATTER HAS BEEN SETTLED. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
